title: Customize Your Computer
drDigitalIntro:
Now do it for real — on your own computer!

1. Open Settings (or System Preferences on a Mac).
2. Switch between light and dark mode — pick the one you like.
3. Adjust the screen brightness to a comfortable level.
4. Turn on Night Shift (or Night Light on Windows) for evening use.
5. If the text feels small, look for a Display or Accessibility setting to make it larger.
6. Check how much storage you have free.

Skip trackpad sensitivity and notification settings — every computer does those differently. The important thing is that you know where Settings is and how to find things inside it.
drDigitalSuccess: You know your way around Settings! The more you explore, the more comfortable your computer will feel.
drDigitalHint: Open your computer's Settings app and try each step on the list above.
